Assignment 1 - About
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
df_pd = df.toPandas() plt.bar(df_pd[“Name”], df_pd[“Age”], color=“skyblue”) plt.title(“Age Distribution”) plt.xlabel(“Name”) plt.ylabel(“Age”) plt.show()

title: Assignment 1 - Home
text:
Assignment 1 - Home
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession import pandas as pd
spark = SparkSession.builder.appName(“QuartoDemo_Assignment1”).getOrCreate()
data = [(“Alice”, 34), (“Bob”, 45), (“Cathy”, 29), (“David”, 51)] columns = [“Name”, “Age”] df = spark.createDataFrame(data, columns)
df.show(3) df.describe().show()
df.toPandas().head()
